name: Qwen3-Coder-Next-80B-A3B
notes: Qwen3 coding-focused MoE: 80B total, 3B active per token. 256K context. Strong agentic coding performance.

name: Step-3.5-Flash-196B-A11B
notes: StepFun MoE: 196B total, 11B active. 256K context. 100-350 tok/s throughput. Apache 2.0 license.

name: MiniMax-M2.5-230B-A10B
notes: MiniMax M2.5: 230B total, 10B active. 200K context. Top-2 routing, RoPE, SiLU activation.

name: Nanbeige4.1-3B
notes: Chinese LLM from Nanbeige. 3.9B params, bilingual EN/ZH. Apache 2.0 license.

name: Jan-v3-4B
notes: Jan v3 code-focused fine-tune of Qwen3. 4B params. Apache 2.0 license.

name: Ministral-3-14B
notes: Mistral's Ministral 3 14B: 13.5B LM + 0.4B vision encoder. 262K context. Multimodal. Apache 2.0.

name: JoyAI-Flash-48B-A3B
notes: JD.com MoE: 48B total, 3B active. 128K context. Muon optimizer, 20T tokens pretraining.

name: Qwen3.5-122B-A10B
notes: Qwen3.5 MoE variant: 122B total, 10B active. Different from benchmarked dense Qwen3.5 models.

name: Falcon-H1R-7B
notes: TII Falcon H1R: hybrid SSM-transformer, 7B params. Multilingual (22 languages). Novel architecture.

name: Tiny-Aya-Global-3.35B
notes: Cohere Labs Tiny Aya: 3.35B params, supports 70+ languages. CC-BY-NC-4.0 license.
